text:
Once there was a young boy named Tim who lived in the peaceful valley bordered by emerald green hills and a sparkling brook. Tim was known for his insatiable curiosity and adventure spirit, often wandering the hills and gliding on his bike through the meadows with his dog, Rusty.

One sunny afternoon, after spending hours chasing bees into combe-like hollows and discovering the most obscure plants in the valley, Tim stumbled across an old farmhouse buried in thickets of weeds and ivy. The door was ajar, and a dust cloud wafted from within. Drawn by an inexplicable pull, Tim crossed the creaky wooden threshold into an emptiness.

Inside, he found an old library with towering shelves, dust-covered books, and an impressive fireplace. The air was warm and comforting. Noticing a loose patch in the floor, Tim carefully stepped on it, and to his surprise, he vanished into a whirlpool of black holes! 

Panic took hold
